'''Pano Umarian''' was one of four [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Umarian brothers|brothers]] who were imprisoned aboard the [[Imperial I-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Devastator/Legends|''Devastator'']]. He participated in a jailbreak in which a group of sympathizers with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] managed to escape from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Warship/Legends|warship]].<ref name="Loyalties" />
